summary: Implemented a bounded local read-only MCP-style runtime for SpecBridge operator state. The new specbridge-mcp-runtime command supports resources/list and resources/read for current-goal, doctor-fix-plan, and orchestration summaries, rejects mutation-capable or unsupported methods with deterministic JSON errors, updates the MCP resource catalog and standard readiness surface to readonly_local_runtime, documents the runtime boundary, and reconciles stale PR #227 by closing it without merge as research-only backlog hygiene.
validations: GitHub Actions SpecBridge Review Gate: passed
GitHub Actions SpecBridge PR Review Report: passed
GitHub Actions Claude Review Non Blocking: passed
policy_result: Within policy. The runtime is local and read-only, exposes no mutation-capable MCP tools, does not start a network transport or hosted server, does not install dependencies, does not access secrets, does not touch production, billing, authentication, authorization, database, deployment, CI/CD security, branch cleanup enforcement, artifact retention enforcement, issue #194, or digital twin implementation. PR #227 was closed without merge and without branch deletion or cleanup enforcement.
risk_result: Medium risk and contained. The change adds a new CLI surface and updates readiness evidence, but the surface is restricted to deterministic resource listing and reading over existing repository-local operator resources.
unresolved_risks: This is a local MCP-style harness, not a network MCP server transport.
Mutation-capable MCP tools remain intentionally blocked.
Branch cleanup and artifact retention debt remain observable but unenforced by policy.
merge_status: PR #235 is open, mergeable, and all required GitHub Actions checks passed on head 49063f68279d9bd53b29fe88fa6c90a33c5058ea. Autonomous merge is allowed by the issue-234 contract once this evidence commit is validated.
